slides.eyebrow: Histori ya Kereiti ya 11 - Kgato ya FET
slides.title: Dikgopolo tsa Morabe Mafelong a Lekgolo la bo19 le la bo20 la Dilemo
slides.lead: Kamoo Maeurope a ileng a iqapela saense ya bohata ya 'morabe', le kamoo dikgopolo tseo di ileng tsa fetolelwa melaong, mebuso e meholo (empires), mme qetellong, polao ya morabe (genocide).

media.alt: Kalipara e teteaneng ya ho lekanya e leng hodima sebopeho sa hlooho ya motho, e emelang saense ya bohata ya ho lekanya morabe.

slides.notes: Qala ka ho hlakisa khang e kgolo ya sehlooho sena kaofela: 'morabe' hase nnete ya baeloji empa ke kgopolo ya setjhaba le ya dipolotiki e hlophisitsweng ke batho, hangata ho lokafatsa matla le ho se lekane. Bontsha esale pele mola o kenang lesolo lohle - ho arola ka mekgahlelo, ebe saense ya bohata (Social Darwinism, eugenics), ebe leano le pefo (polao ya morabe ya bokoloni, Jeremane ya Manazi, le dikamano le Afrika Borwa). Theha potso ya boemo ba FET ya ho sekaseka: dikgopolo di fetoha diphello jwang?

slides.title: Re bolela eng ka 'morabe'?
slides.lead: Saense ya kajeno e dumellana hore ha ho na motheo wa baeloji wa ho arola batho ka 'merabe' e arohaneng.

blocks.text: **Morabe** ke mokgwa wa ho arola batho ka dibopeho tsa mmele tse kang mmala wa letlalo. O utlwahala eka o tlwaelehile, empa ke **kaho ya setjhaba** - kgopolo e entsweng ke ditjhaba, eseng nnete e fumanwang baelojing. Batho ba arolelana ho feta 99.9% ya DNA ya bona, mme ho na le phapang e kgolo ya diijene *ka hare* ho sehlopha se bitswang sa morabe ho feta *pakeng tsa* dihlopha.

items: **Khethollo ya morabe (racism)** ke tumelo ya hore dihlopha tsena di ka behwa maemong, tse ding di le 'hodimo' ho tse ding.
Lekgolong la bo1800 la dilemo, Maeurope a ile a apesa tumelo ena ka puo ya saense.
Khethollo ena ya morabe ya 'saense' e ile ya sebediswa ho lokafatsa bokgoba, mebuso e meholo, mme hamorao, polao e kgolo ya batho.

slides.notes: Hlakisa ka hloko dipolelo tse tharo tseo baithuti ba sa lokelang ho di ferekanya: morabe (sehlopha), khethollo ya morabe (mokgwa wa tumelo wa ho beha maemong), le khethollo ya morabe ya saense/ya saense ya bohata (boiteko ba ho paka ho beha maemong hoo ka saense). Hatisa hore ho bitsa morabe 'kaho ya setjhaba' ha ho bolele hore khethollo ya morabe ke ya boiqapelo - diphello tsa yona ke tsa nnete ka mokgwa o sehlōhō. Hlahisa hore ke hobaneng saense ena e ne e kgahleha dihlopha tse nang le matla: e ne e etsa hore ho se lekane ho shebahale eka ke tlhaho ho ena le kgetho.

slides.eyebrow: Metso ya Enlightenment - lekgolo la bo18 la dilemo
slides.title: Ho arola batho ka mekgahlelo
slides.lead: Ditsebi tsa tlhaho tsa Europe di ile tsa qala ho arola batho ka mefuta e sa fetoheng - mme di ntse di ba beha maemong ka setu.

blocks.text: Nakong ya Enlightenment, borasaense ba ile ba leka ho arola dintho tsohle tse phelang ka mekgahlelo. **Carl Linnaeus** (1735) le **Johann Blumenbach** (1795) ba ile ba arola batho ka 'mefuta' e mmalwa ho ipapisitse le mmala wa letlalo le sebopeho sa lehata (skull). Blumenbach o ile a qapa lentswe *Caucasian* mme, ka bohlokwa, a beha Maeurope hodimo ho tsohle morerong wa hae.

items: Ho arola ho ne ho shebahala ho sa ikeme lehlakoreng, empa ho ne ho hahile **tatellano ya maemo** e nkang Maeurope e le mohlala o phethahetseng.
Dihlopha tsena di ile tsa bopjwa ke mehla ya bokgoba le mebuso e meholo e neng e ntse e ata.
Banahani ba hamorao ba ile ba tshwara mefuta ena e qapilweng eka e tsitsitse ebile e le ya tlhaho.

media.alt: Mabokose a mane a nang le mabitso a hlophisitsweng joalo ka phiramite e behilweng maemong, a emelang dihlopha tsa morabe tse qapilweng.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='84' y='24' width='52' height='26' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='64' y='58' width='92' height='26' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='44' y='92' width='132' height='26' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='24' y='126' width='172' height='26' fill='#b7a98d'/><line x1='110' y1='18' x2='110' y2='152' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha motsamao o patilweng: ho arola (ho hlopha) ho ile ha thellela tatellanong ya maemo (ho beha maemong) ntle le bopaki bofe kapa bofe ba ho beha maemong. Blumenbach ka boyena o ne a sa behe maemong ho feta ba mo sebedisitseng, empa balatedi ba hae ba ile ba thatafatsa dihlopha tsa hae - ona ke mohlala o motle wa kamoo saense e ka kobjwang ho sebeletsa leeme. [SME] Netefatsa matsatsi/tlhaloso e nepahetseng (Linnaeus 1735 Systema Naturae; khatiso ya Blumenbach ya 1795) kgahlano le sengolwa sa SAHO pele ho phatlalatso.

slides.eyebrow: Saense ya bohata - lekgolo la bo19 la dilemo
slides.title: Khethollo ya morabe ya saense
slides.lead: Ho lekanya dihata le mmele ho 'paka' tatellano ya maemo e neng e se e entswe qetong esale pele.

blocks.text: Lekgolong la bo1800 la dilemo, bakhetholli ba morabe ba ile ba sebedisa disebediswa tse kang **craniometry** (ho lekanya boholo ba lehata) le **phrenology** (ho bala mekokotlo hloohong) ho bolela hore dihlopha tse ding di bohlale ho feta tse ding. Re bitsa sena **khethollo ya morabe ya saense ya bohata** hobane e sebedisitse *ponahalo* ya saense empa e hlokomoloha mokgwa o nepahetseng - bafuputsi ba ne ba batla bopaki ba ho tiisa seo ba neng ba se dumela.

items: Datha e ne e kgethwa, e balwa hampe kapa e qapuwa ho tshehetsa boholo ba Maeurope.
Qeto (tatellano ya maemo ya morabe) e ne e nkuwe pele 'dipatlisiso' di qala.
E ile ya fa bokgoba, tlhōlo ya bokoloni le kgethollano lebaka le hlomphehang, la 'saense'.

media.alt: Lehata pela sehlopha sa dikarohanyi tsa ho lekanya le sekaliswa (ruler).
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 46 q40 -20 66 8 q20 22 6 50 q-6 12 -22 12 h-8 v14 h-14 v-14 h-10 q-20 0 -26 -22 q-8 -30 8 -48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='84' cy='78' r='8' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='110' cy='80' r='7' fill='#5c1414'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='188' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='188' y2='30' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hatisa bothata ba mokgwa, hobane ke pelo ya kgopolo ena: saense ya bohata e fetola tsamaiso ya saense ka ho qala ka karabo mme e batla tshehetso. Craniometry (mohlala pokello ya dihata tsa bafuputsi ba kang Samuel Morton) hamorao e ile ya bontshwa e tletse leeme le diphoso. Hokahanya le tsebo ya FET ya ho lekola ho tshepahala ha mehlodi - bana e ne e le 'ditsebi' tseo bolaodi ba tsona bo ileng ba sebediswa hampe.

slides.eyebrow: Ho sebedisa Darwin hampe - ho tloha 1859
slides.title: Social Darwinism
slides.lead: Ho sotha kgopolo-taba mabapi le tlhaho ho e etsa lebaka la sehlōhō sa batho.

blocks.text: Buka ya Charles Darwin ya *On the Origin of Species* (1859) e ile ya hlalosa kamoo mefuta ya diphoofolo e fetohang ka kgetho ya tlhaho. Ba bang - haholoholo **Herbert Spencer**, ya ileng a qapa polelwana *survival of the fittest* (ho phela ha ba matla ka ho fetisisa) - ba ile ba sebedisa sena hampe ditjhabeng tsa batho. **Social Darwinism** e ile ya bolela hore ditjhaba tse ruileng, maemo le 'merabe' di ne di busa hobane e ne e le tse phahameng ka tlhaho.

items: E ile ya hlahisa ho se lekane le bofuma joalo ka ntho ya tlhaho ebile e hlokahala.
E ile ya lokafatsa bobusi ba mebuso e meholo (imperialism): tlhōlo e ile ya hlahiswa e le 'ba matla' ba hlōlang 'ba fokolang' tlhōlisanong.
Baeloji ya Darwin e ile ya sothwa; ha aa ka a bolela hore batho ba bang ba lokela ho busa ba bang.

media.alt: Mekokotlo e nyolohang ya mabanta e nang le motsu, e bontshang lere la bohata la tswelopele.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='116' width='36' height='28' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='66' y='96' width='36' height='48' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='108' y='72' width='36' height='72' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='150' y='44' width='36' height='100' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M30 108 L180 36' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M180 36 L168 40 M180 36 L176 50' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Nepahatsa bakeng sa baithuti ba FET: Social Darwinism ke tshebediso e fosahetseng ya Darwin, eseng maikutlo a Darwin ka boyena (leraba le tlwaelehileng la ditlhahlobo). Spencer, eseng Darwin, o ile a qapa 'survival of the fittest'. Tshebetso ya bohlokwa ya kgopolo ena e ne e le ya maikutlo a mabapi le puso - e ile ya etsa hore kaho ya mebuso e meholo ya Maeurope le ho se lekane ho boima ha moruo ho shebahale joalo ka melao ya tlhaho eo ho seng motho ya ka e hananang kapa ya lokelang ho e hanana.

slides.title: Eugenics
slides.lead: Haeba setjhaba se ne se ka hlahisa dijalo le dikgomo tse betere, ba bang ba ne ba bolela, ke hobaneng re sa hlahiseng batho ba 'betere'?

blocks.text: **Eugenics** (e tswang Segerikeng se bolelang 'ya tswetsweng hantle') e ile ya rehwa lebitso ke **Francis Galton**, motswala wa Darwin, ka 1883. E ne e ikemiseditse ho 'ntlafatsa' palo ya batho ka ho kgothaletsa 'ba loketseng' ho ba le bana (*positive* eugenics) le ho thibela 'ba sa lokelang' ho etsa jwalo (*negative* eugenics) - ka kgethollano, dithibelo tsa lenyalo le ho fedisa peo ka dikgoka (sterilisation).

items: 'Ba sa lokelang' ho ne ho hlalositswe ho akaretsa mafutsana, ba holofetseng, ba kulang kelellong le batho ba seng basweu.
E ile ya fetola khethollo ya morabe ya saense ya bohata **lenaneo la ketso ya mmuso**.
Mathwasong a lekgolo la bo1900 la dilemo, eugenics e ne e tlwaelehile ebile e hlomphuwa Europe le United States.

media.alt: Sefate sa lelapa se qapilweng se nang le makala a mang a tshwailweng le a kgaotsweng, se emelang tswala e kgethang.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='110' y1='140' x2='110' y2='70' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='60' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='160' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='104' x2='150' y2='96' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='60' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='154' cy='96' r='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><line x1='140' y1='82' x2='168' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='168' y1='82' x2='140' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sena ke seketjhaba sa phetoho: eugenics ke moo dikgopolo tse kotsi di fetohang merero ya ketso ya mmuso kgahlano le batho ba sebele. Hlokomela hore eugenics e ne e se tumelo ya lehlakoreng - e ne e rutwa diyunivesithing tse etellang pele mme e tshehetswa ke borasaense ba hlomphehang, bo-radipolotiki le baruhelli ho pharalla le mefuta yohle ya dipolotiki. Tlhompho eo ke yona e neng e e etsa hore e be kotsi haholo. Bontsha esale pele hore diseketjhaba tse pedi tse latelang di bontsha eugenics e kenngwa molaong.

slides.title: Eugenics United States
slides.lead: Amerika e ne e le naha ya pele ho fetola eugenics leano la mmuso le leholo.

blocks.text: Ho tloha 1907, dinaha tsa United States di ile tsa fetisa melao ya ho **fedisa peo ka dikgoka** ya batho ba nkwang ba le 'ba sa lokelang'. Nyeweng ya 1927 ya *Buck v. Bell*, Lekgotla le ka Hodimo le ile la amohela tshebetso ya ho fedisa peo, moo Moahlodi Oliver Wendell Holmes a ileng a ngola mola o tummeng ka bobe, 'Meloko e meraro ya dithoto e lekane.' Dikete tse mashome tsa Maamerika di ile tsa fediswa peo ntle le tumello, mme Molao wa Bofalledi wa 1924 (Immigration Act) o ile wa sebedisa monahano wa eugenics ho qhelela ka thoko dihlopha 'tse sa lakatsehang'.

items: Bahlaselwa ba ne ba le bafutsana, ba holofetseng le ba tswang ditjhabeng tse nyane ka bongata bo sa lekanang.
Eugenics ya United States e ne e tshehetswa ka ditjhelete, e hlophisitswe ebile e ratwa machabeng.
Borasaense ba morabe ba Jeremane ba ile ba ithuta melao ya Amerika ka hloko joalo ka mohlala.

media.alt: Hamore ya moahlodi e phomotseng hodima tokomane e tshwailweng ka tiiso e kgubedu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='48' y='70' width='90' height='70' fill='#fff' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='98' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='112' width='44' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='116' cy='126' r='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='44' height='18' rx='4' fill='#5c1414' transform='rotate(35 172 49)'/><rect x='150' y='58' width='10' height='40' rx='3' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(35 155 78)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Se re ithutang sona ke hore tsela e isang diketsong tse sehlōhō tsa Manazi ha e a ka ya qala Jeremane. United States, demokrasi, e ile ya qala leano la eugenics la dikgoka, mme baetsi ba melao ba Manazi ba ile ba qotsa melao ya Amerika phatlalatsa ha ba ngola ya bona. Sebetsana le poleo ya Buck v. Bell ka hloko - e bitse nnete ya histori e hlabisang dihlong, eseng thohako e ka pheteletswang feela. [SME] Netefatsa dipalo tsohle tsa ho fedisa peo (hangata di qotswa e le tse fetang 60,000 lekgolong lohle la bo20 la dilemo) le tseko ya 'molao wa pele' wa Indiana wa 1907 kgahlano le mohlodi wa SAHO pele ho phatlalatso.

slides.title: Bokoloni le polao ya morabe ya Maherero le Manama
slides.lead: German South West Africa (kajeno Namibia), dikgopolo tsa morabe di ile tsa hlahisa seo ba bangata ba se bitsang polao ya morabe ya pele lekgolong la bo20 la dilemo.

blocks.text: Ha batho ba **Maherero** le **Manama** ba fetohela puso ya bokoloni ya Jeremane, General **Lothar von Trotha** o ile a ntsha taelo ya ho felisa (1904). Ba pholohileng ba ile ba lelekelwa lehwatateng kapa dikampeng tsa kgatello (concentration camps), moo dikete di ileng tsa shwa. Dihata tsa bafu di ile tsa romelwa Jeremane ho sebediswa dipatlisisong tsa 'saense ya morabe'.

items: Borahistori ba hakanya hore hoo e ka bang Maherero a 65,000 le Manama a 10,000 a ile a bolawa.
Kgopolo-taba ya morabe e ile ya fetola polao e kgolo ho e etsa ho tloswa ho 'tlhaho' ha batho ba 'tlase'.
Dikgopolo tse tshwanang tsa dikampe le tatellano ya maemo ya morabe di ne di tla hlaha hape Europe mashome a dilemo hamorao.

media.alt: Leru la lehwatate le sehlōhō le nang le letsatsi le tlase, le hopotsang lehwatate la Namib.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 104 q60 -22 120 0 t120 0 v56 H0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M0 132 q80 -14 240 4 v24 H0 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Seketjhaba sena se theha dikgopolo tse sa bonahaleng ketsong e sehlōhō e nang le bohlokwa bo tobileng ba selehae sa Afrika Borwa (Namibia e ne e busiwa ke Afrika Borwa boholo ba lekgolo la bo20 la dilemo). Hatisa taba e tshosang ya dihata tse ileng tsa romelwa dipatlisisong tsa morabe - e bontsha saense ya bohata le pefo e kgolo di ijesa. Hula mohala o hlakileng wa tswellopele ho ya Jeremane ya Manazi ntle le ho kopanya diketsahalo tse pedi hore e be e le nngwe. [SME] Tlhahiso ya 'polao ya morabe ya pele lekgolong la bo20 la dilemo' le dipalo tsa mahu di sebediswa haholo empa di phehiswa dikgang bophara; netefatsa kgahlano le sengolwa sa SAHO sa Herero Revolt.

slides.eyebrow: Mmuso wa morabe - Jeremane ya Manazi
slides.title: 'Morabe o busang' wa Manazi
slides.lead: Manazi a ile a haha mmuso ohle ho pota-pota saense ya bohata ya morabe o busang wa 'Aryan'.

blocks.text: Kamora 1933, Jeremane ya Manazi e ile ya etsa tatellano ya maemo ya morabe motheo wa molao. Ba ile ba qapa morabe o busang wa **Aryan** (*Herrenvolk*) mme ba hlalosa Bajuda, Maroma, batho ba batsho le ba bang joalo ka 'dira' tse tlase. **Melao ya Nuremberg (1935)** e ile ya amoha Bajuda boahi mme ya thibela lenyalo pakeng tsa Bajuda le Majeremane a mang - ho fetola khethollo ya morabe ya saense ya bohata tsamaiso ya molao ya ho qhelela ka thoko.

items: Molao wa 1933 o ile wa dumella ho felisa peo ka dikgoka ha 'ba sa lokelang ka lefutso', ho latela eugenics ya United States.
Mashano a phatlalatso (propaganda), dikolo le saense kaofela di ile tsa ruta tatellano ya maemo ya morabe joalo ka nnete.
Ho qhelela ka thoko ho ile ha eketseha mohato ka mohato: ho tloha boahing, ho ya thepeng, ho isa bophelong ka bobona.

media.alt: Tokomane ya semmuso e tshwailweng ebe e tabolwa dikarolong tse pedi, e emelang boahi bo tlositsweng ka molao.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='118' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='60' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='72' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M104 30 L112 60 L104 90 L112 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M118 30 L110 60 L118 90 L110 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha baithuti mokgwa oo sehlooho sa CAPS se batlang ba o utlwisise: dikgopolo tsa morabe di fetoha 'karolo ya bohlokwa ya leano la mmuso le molao'. Melao ya Nuremberg ke mohlala o hlakileng ka ho fetisisa - molao o hlalosang hore ke mang ya nkwang joalo ka motho ka botlalo. Bontsha mohala o tobileng ho tloha seketjhabeng sa pejana sa eugenics ya United States: molao wa Jeremane wa 1933 wa ho fedisa peo o ne o etselitswe karolo e nngwe ho ipapisitswe le melao ya Amerika. Hatisa mokgwa wa ho eketseha wa tlhoriso - ha ea ka ya qala ka polao, e qadile ka mangolo.

slides.title: Holocaust
slides.lead: Kgopolo ya morabe e ile ya fella ka polao e hlophisitsweng, ya boindasteri ya dimillione tsa batho.

blocks.text: Nakong ya Ntwa ya Bobedi ya Lefatshe, mmuso wa Manazi o ile wa etsa **Holocaust** - polao e neng e reretswe, e hlophisitsweng ya hoo e ka bang **Bajuda ba dimillione tse tsheletseng**, hammoho le Maroma, batho ba holofetseng, dira tsa dipolotiki le ba bang ba neng ba nkuwa ba 'sa tshwanele bophelo'. Ena e ne e le pheletso e tshosang ya lekgolo la dilemo la monahano wa morabe o neng o behile batho maemong mme o nkile bohato ho ipapisa le maemo ao.

items: Ba holofetseng ba ne ba le har'a bahlaselwa ba pele, ka lenaneo la pejana la 'euthanasia' (ho bolaya ka morero).
Bolaodi, saense le theknoloji di ile tsa sebediswa ho bolaya ka boemo ba boindasteri.
Holocaust e eme joalo ka temoso e boima ka ho fetisisa ya moo dikgopolo tsa morabe di ka isang teng.

media.alt: Kerese e le nngwe e tukang kgahlano le semelo se lefifi, letshwao la sehopotso.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#2b2b2b'/><rect x='88' y='72' width='24' height='60' rx='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='8' height='16' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M100 22 q14 20 0 36 q-14 -16 0 -36 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M100 34 q7 10 0 20 q-7 -10 0 -20 Z' fill='#fff4d6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sena ke seketjhaba se ammang maikutlo ka ho fetisisa - se sebetse ka boima le hloko. Boloka tsepamiso hodima tefello ya botho le hodima ho hopola, eseng hodima dintlha tse bonahalang. Etsa ntlha ya tlhahlobo ya hore Holocaust e ne e se bohlanya bo hlahileng hanghang empa e ne e le pheletso e utlwahalang ya dikgopolo tseo baithuti ba di lateletseng lesolo lohle: ho arola, tatellano ya maemo, ho amoha botho, ho qhelela ka thoko, ebe ho felisa. Hlokomela tataiso ya thuto ya SAHO mabapi le Holocaust mme o hokahanye le ditokelo tsa botho tse ileng tsa hlaha hamorao (Phatlalatso ya Lefatshe ya Ditokelo tsa Botho ya 1948 le lentswe 'polao ya morabe').

slides.eyebrow: Ho e tlisa hae - Afrika Borwa
slides.title: Dikgopolo tsa morabe le Afrika Borwa
slides.lead: Mekgahlelo e tshwanang ya monahano wa morabe e ile ya bopa kgethollano le apartheid hae.

blocks.text: Afrika Borwa e ne e le karolo ya pale ena ya lefatshe. Mebuso ya bokoloni le ya bajaki e ile ya sebedisa dikgopolo tse tshwanang tsa saense ya bohata ho lokafatsa tlhōlo, ho amohuwa ha mobu le kgethollano. Kamora 1948, **apartheid** e ile ya haha tsamaiso yohle ya molao hodima karolo ya morabe - haholoholo ka **Population Registration Act ya 1950**, e ileng ya arola motho e mong le e mong ka 'morabe' wa semmuso.

items: Borahistori hangata ba bapisa melao ya pele ya apartheid le melao ya morabe ya Manazi.
Ho bobedi, mmuso, eseng baeloji, o ile wa etsa qeto ya hore ke mang ya welang 'morabeng' ofe.
Ho utlwisisa saense ya bohata ya morabe ho thusa ho hlalosa hore ke hobaneng apartheid e ne e se toka motsong wa yona.

media.alt: Buka ya boitsebiso e tshwailweng ka sehlopha, e hopotsang karolo ya morabe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='45' y='24' width='90' height='112' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='56' y='38' width='34' height='40' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='73' cy='54' r='9' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 74 q13 -14 26 0 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='96' y='42' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='92' width='68' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='56' y='116' width='52' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Bontsha bohlokwa ba sehlooho bakeng sa baithuti ba Afrika Borwa: dikgopolo tse ithutwang mona e ne e se feela bothata ba Europe, di ne di sebedisitswe ho haha kgethollano le apartheid hae. Etsa papiso e hlokolosi le Jeremane ya Manazi (ka bobedi di sebedisitse karolo ya mmuso) mme o hlokomele diphapang - apartheid e ne e ikemiseditse tlhekefetso e laolwang le karohano ho ena le ho felisa. Sena se hokahana ka pele le diyuniti tsa apartheid tsa Kereiti ya 11 le 12.

slides.title: Ho tloha ho arola ho isa tlokotsing

blocks.alt: Mola wa nako wa tswelopele ya dikgopolo tsa morabe ho tloha 1735 ho isa 1950.

events.label: Darwin o phatlalatsa On the Origin of Species
Polao ya morabe ya Maherero le Manama e a qala
Buck v. Bell ya US e amohela ho fedisa peo ka dikgoka
Melao ya karolo ya apartheid Afrika Borwa

slides.notes: Sebedisa mola wa nako ho kopanya khang joalo ka ketane ya sesosa le phello: kgopolo (ho arola) e thatafalla e be saense ya bohata (Social Darwinism, eugenics), e ngolwang molaong (US, Jeremane ya Manazi, Afrika Borwa) mme e etswang pefo (polao ya morabe ya bokoloni, Holocaust). Kopa baithuti hore ba tsebe hore diketsahalo dife ke 'dikgopolo', dife ke 'melao' mme dife ke 'pefo' - ho tiisa sebopeho sa motheo sa sehlooho pele ho dipotso tsa tlhahlobo.

slides.title: Seo re ithutileng sona
slides.lead: Dikgopolo di na le matla: saense ya bohata ya morabe, hang ha e dumelwa mme e etswa molao, e ile ya jella maphelo a dimillione tse mashome.

blocks.text: Lesolong lena lohle re latetse kamoo 'morabe' o ileng wa **qapuwa, eseng wa sibolloa**; kamoo saense ya bohata (Social Darwinism le eugenics) e ileng ya fa khethollo ya morabe maseko a hlomphehang; le kamoo, ha mebuso e ngola dikgopolo tsena **molaong**, diphello di ileng tsa tloha ho fedisa peo ka dikgoka ho isa polaong ya morabe ya bokoloni le Holocaust. Ho ithuta histori ena ke temoso ka kotsi ya dikgopolo tse amohang botho - le tshireletso ya ditokelo tsa botho le seriti sa motho.

blocks.label: Q1
blocks.question: Hlalosa hore ke hobaneng borahistori ba hlalosa saense ya morabe ya lekgolo la bo19 la dilemo joalo ka 'saense ya bohata'. Bua ka kamoo diqeto di ileng tsa fihlelwa kateng.

blocks.label: Q2
blocks.question: 'Dikgopolo tsa morabe di ile tsa fetoha kotsi ka nnete feela ha mebuso e di fetola molao.' Na o a dumela? Sebedisa bonyane mehlala e mmedi ho tswa lesolong lena ho tshehetsa karabo ya hao.

blocks.label: Q3
blocks.question: Bapisa tsela eo morabe o ileng wa sebediswa ka yona Jeremane ya Manazi le Afrika Borwa ya apartheid. Bontsha ho tshwana ho le hong le phapang e le nngwe.

slides.notes: Qetella ka ho kgutlela tsekong ya pele - morabe ke kaho ya setjhaba e nang le diphello tsa nnete tse ripitlang - le ka ho tiisa karabelo ya ditokelo tsa botho e ileng ya latela 1945. Sebedisa dipotso tse tharo joalo ka tekolo e ngotsweng kapa puisano e hlophisitsweng; kabo ya matshwao e latela mekgwa ya CAPS ya ho ngola ho atolositsweng le ya papiso ya mehlodi (Q2 ke serapa/tlhaloso e nyane; Q3 e itlwaetsa tsebo ya papiso eo sehlooho se e hlokang). Hopotsa baithuti hore sehlooho sena ke motheo wa diyuniti tsa hamorao tsa apartheid le tsa ditokelo tsa botho.
